channel_names.description: For multi-channel per-vertex attributes, the channel labels.

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

Axis.description: One axis of the spatial index.  Mirrors the OME-Zarr NGFF axis object (RFC 4/5).
Axis.title: Axis

BoundingBox.description: Two parallel ``ndim``-length arrays representing the global ``(min_corner, max_corner)`` of the store's vertices.  Stored on disk as ``[[min...], [max...]]``; modelled here as a class so cross-field rules can require matching dimensionality.
BoundingBox.title: BoundingBox

sid_ndim.description: Number of spatial-index dimensions encoded in chunk keys.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

sid_ndim.description: Number of spatial-index dimensions encoded in chunk keys.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

CrossChunkStrategy.description: How connectivity that crosses chunk boundaries is represented.
CrossChunkStrategy.title: CrossChunkStrategy

FormatCapability.description: Optional 0.3+ feature tokens a store advertises in :attr:`RootMetadata.format_capabilities`.  Open-set: new tokens will be added in future spec revisions; readers must tolerate unknown values.
FormatCapability.title: FormatCapability

GeometryType.description: The kind of geometry a store (or one of its sub-types) holds.
GeometryType.title: GeometryType

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

shape.description: Shape of a dense per-object/per-group array.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.
Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

LevelMetadata.description: Per-resolution-level ``.zattrs`` payload, persisted under the key ``zarr_vectors_level``.  Validates the runtime :class:`zarr_vectors.core.metadata.LevelMetadata` dataclass.

arrays_present.description: Names of arrays present in the level group.

bin_ratio.description: Integer fold-change per axis relative to level 0.

bin_shape.description: Per-axis supervoxel edge lengths at this level.  Must be ``None`` for level 0 (inherits ``base_bin_shape``); must be set for level > 0.

chunk_attribute_name.description: Name of the per-vertex attribute used as the leading chunk axis.

chunk_attribute_values.description: Ordered list mapping attribute-bin index to original attribute value.  Must be non-empty when set, and coherent with ``chunk_attribute_name`` (both set or both absent).

chunk_dims.description: Chunk-key axis names; the leading axis names appear first.  Set when the level uses attribute chunking (e.g. ``["gene", "z", "y", "x"]``).

object_sparsity.description: Fraction of objects retained at this level.

vertex_count.description: Total number of vertices at this level.

LevelMetadata.title: LevelMetadata

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

LinksConvention.description: How intra-chunk links are represented for a polyline/graph/mesh.
LinksConvention.title: LinksConvention

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

link_width.description: Width of a links row (2 for edges, 3 or 4 for face rows).

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

num_metanodes.description: Total metanode count in a coarsening sidecar.

sid_ndim.description: Number of spatial-index dimensions encoded in chunk keys.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

shape.description: Shape of a dense per-object/per-group array.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

ObjectIndexConvention.description: How the object_id → vertex-group mapping is encoded.
ObjectIndexConvention.title: ObjectIndexConvention

num_objects.description: Total object count this array carries.

sid_ndim.description: Number of spatial-index dimensions encoded in chunk keys.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

batch_id.description: Monotonic batch id for an ``object_index/pending/<batch>`` sidecar.

num_objects.description: Total object count this array carries.

sid_ndim.description: Number of spatial-index dimensions encoded in chunk keys.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

RootMetadata.description: Root-level ``.zattrs`` payload, persisted under the key ``zarr_vectors``.  Validates the runtime :class:`zarr_vectors.core.metadata.RootMetadata` dataclass.

base_bin_shape.description: Supervoxel bin edge lengths at level 0.  When set, every value must be > 0 and ``chunk_shape`` must be an integer multiple along every axis (enforced runtime-side in ``RootMetadata.validate``).

chunk_shape.description: Physical spatial chunk size per axis (all values > 0).

crs.description: Optional coordinate reference system metadata (free-form dict matching whatever CRS vocabulary the store uses).

format_capabilities.description: Optional 0.3+ feature tokens advertised by this store.

format_version.description: Spec version this store was written against (e.g. "0.3").

geometry_types.description: One or more geometry kinds present in the store.

spatial_index_dims.description: NGFF-style axis list — at least 2, with ≥2 of type "space".

RootMetadata.title: RootMetadata

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

encoding.description: How the chunk bytes are encoded.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

ZvArrayTag.description: Discriminator value for per-array ``.zattrs`` blocks (slot ``zv_array``).  Each writer in ``zarr_vectors/core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding tag.
ZvArrayTag.title: ZvArrayTag
